name: BITTERMOLD
description: A staring, stooped human that scuttles along. Pale, wet skin.
statblock: AC 12, HP 5, ATK 1 shortsword +1 (1d6) or 1 sling (far) +2 (1d4), MV near, S +1, D +2, C +1, I +0, W +0, Ch +0, AL C, LV 1

abilities.name: Rubbery
abilities.description: Half damage from stabbing weapons.

name: BOGTHORN
description: A skittering nest of nettles and thorns with marshlights for eyes.
statblock: AC 13, HP 11, ATK 1 stab +0 (1d4) or 1 thorn hail (near) +2 (1d4 + poison), MV near (climb), S +0, D +2, C +2, I -3, W +1, Ch -3, AL C, LV 2

abilities.name: Poison
abilities.description: DC 12 CON or paralyzed for 1d4 rounds.

name: DRALECH
description: As tall as two humans with a pair of curved horns, a shark's grin, and an axe of white bone.
statblock: AC 13, HP 29, ATK 3 bone axe +5 (2d6), MV near, S +4, D +1, C +2, I +0, W +0, Ch +1, AL C, LV 6

abilities.name: Shatter
abilities.description: Destroy one non-magic gear instead of dealing damage.

name: GORDOCK BREEG
description: A halfling with a distant gaze and black veins around his lips.
statblock: AC 15 (chainmail), HP 19, ATK 1 bastard sword +3 (1d10) or 1 sling (far) +2 (1d4), MV near, S +3, D +2, C +1, I +1, W +2, Ch +2, AL N, LV 4

abilities.name: Algae-Eater
abilities.description: Lose 1d4 HP to gain advantage on next check/attack.

name: HEXLING
description: A whispering, writhing shadow that coils and snaps like a whip.
statblock: AC 12, HP 11, ATK 1 chill touch +2 (1d6 + energy drain), MV near, S +0, D +2, C +2, I +0, W +1, Ch +0, AL C, LV 2

abilities.name: Energy Drain
abilities.description: 1d4 CON damage. If reduced to 0, become hexling.

name: HOWLER
description: A lunging halfling with sharpened teeth wearing a cloak of coyote pelts.
statblock: AC 15 (leather + shield), HP 5, ATK 1 club +2 (1d4) or 1 sling (far) +2 (1d4), MV near, S +2, D +2, C +1, I +0, W +0, Ch +0, AL N, LV 1

abilities.name: Mob
abilities.description: Deal +1 damage in melee when beside an ally.

name: ICHOR OOZE
description: A trembling mass of filmy bile that slurps toward warmth.
statblock: AC 12, HP 15, ATK 2 tendril +3 (1d6), MV near (climb), S +3, D +2, C +2, I -3, W +1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 3

abilities.name: Rubbery
abilities.description: Half damage from stabbing weapons.

abilities.name: Corrosive
abilities.description: Metal or wood that touches the ooze is destroyed on a d6 roll of 1.

name: MARROW FIEND
description: A wolfish hulk of razor bone and sinewy muscle. Black marrow tree sap drips from its jaws and the gaps in its bony plating.
statblock: AC 15, HP 39, ATK 2 claws +7 (1d10) and 1 sap gout (near line) +5 (2d6 + sap), MV near (climb), S +4, D +4, C +3, I +2, W +3, Ch +3, AL C, LV 8

abilities.name: Devour
abilities.description: Use turn to devour a humanoid body to regain 3d8 HP.

abilities.name: Sap
abilities.description: DC 15 DEX check or stuck in place. Repeat check on turn to escape.

name: MUGDULBLUB
description: A roiling mass of stars floating in a whirlpool of purple goo.
statblock: AC 16, HP 58, ATK 3 tendril (near) +8 (2d8) and 1 dissolve, MV near (climb, swim), S +5, D +3, C +4, I +2, W +3, Ch +4, AL C, LV 12

abilities.name: Rubbery
abilities.description: Half damage from stabbing weapons.

abilities.name: Mutagenic
abilities.description: Creatures within near 1:6 chance on their turn of a mutation. 1d4: 1. Extra eye, 2-3. Lost bone, 4. Extra finger

abilities.name: Dissolve
abilities.description: One creature within far DC 15 CON or lose 1d4 CON. If reduced to 0, become ichor ooze under Mugdulblub's control.

name: MUTANT CATFISH
description: A slimy, enormous catfish with four limbs and webbed claws. Amphibious and dimly intelligent.
statblock: AC 11, HP 11, ATK 1 claw +2 (1d6) or 1 barb (near) +2 (1d4 + poison), MV near (swim), S +2, D +1, C +2, I -2, W +0, Ch -2, AL N, LV 2

abilities.name: Poison
abilities.description: DC 12 CON or paralyzed 1d4 rounds.

name: PLOGRINA BITTERMOLD
description: Lank-haired and moon-eyed. Purple ichor dribbles from the corners of her trembling mouth.
statblock: AC 14, HP 25, ATK 2 tendril (near) +4 (1d6), MV near, S +0, D +4, C +3, I +1, W +1, Ch +3, AL C, LV 5

abilities.name: Rubbery
abilities.description: Half damage from stabbing weapons.

abilities.name: Slime Form
abilities.description: Turn into a puddle of slime that can climb walls for 1d4 rounds (does not use action).

name: SKRELL
description: A gobbling, scabby raptor with rolling eyes and hooked claws.
statblock: AC 13, HP 5, ATK 1 claw +2 (1d6), MV double near, S +2, D +3, C +1, I -3, W +1, Ch -3, AL C, LV 1

abilities.name: Clever
abilities.description: Advantage on checks to do the same action on a consecutive turn.

name: TAR BAT
description: A pinwheeling bat that smells of sulfur. Excretes a black, tarry oil.
statblock: AC 13, HP 4, ATK 1 bite +3 (1d4), MV near (fly), S -3, D +3, C +0, I -3, W +1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 1

abilities.name: Pyro
abilities.description: Seeks open flames, ignites on contact with them to deal +1d4 damage. Immune to fire.

name: THE WILLOWMAN
description: A pale, faceless man with elongated limbs and curved talons that rake the ground. Moves in quick stutters during each eyeblink.
statblock: AC 17, HP 61, ATK 3 finger needle +9 (2d10) and 1 terrify, MV near (teleport), S +5, D +7, C +3, I +4, W +4, Ch +5, AL C, LV 13

abilities.name: Fearless
abilities.description: Immune to morale checks.

abilities.name: Terrify
abilities.description: One target in near DC 15 CHA or paralyzed 1d4 rounds.

abilities.name: Waking Nightmare
abilities.description: In place of attacks, all creatures within near DC 15 CHA or flee in a random direction for 1d4 rounds.
